label: Folder Graph Scanner
description: Scans a folder structure and extracts node/edge relations to build a code.graph.json. Maps hierarchy to layer nodes, extracts task nodes from node.tasks.json, and analyzes import chains for data-flow edges.

inputs.name: folderPath
inputs.description: Absolute path to the folder to scan

outputs.name: nodes
outputs.description: Discovered node map keyed by id

outputs.name: edges
outputs.description: Discovered edge map keyed by id

outputs.name: metadata
outputs.description: Scan stats: nodeCount, edgeCount, scanDate, rootPath
